title: Dichostylis ludwigii
taxonomy: Dichostylis ludwigii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Dichostylis, which is a genus of annual or biennial plants native to South Africa. The family Boraginaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. This family includes a wide range of plants with different growth habits and characteristics. Dichostylis ludwigii's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Boraginaceae family.
